index.html:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang='en'>
<head>
<meta charset='UTF-8'>
<title>Memory Match</title>
<style>*{margin:0;padding:0}body{background:#0a1a2a;display:flex;justify-content:center;align-items:center;height:100vh}canvas{display:block;cursor:pointer}</style>
</head>
<body>
<canvas id='c' width='600' height='420'></canvas>
<script>
const cv=document.getElementById('c'),ctx=cv.getContext('2d');
const W=600,H=420;
const EMOJIS=['🍎','🍌','🍇','🍓','🍊','🍋','🍒','🍑'];
const CARD_W=90,CARD_H=90,GAP=10;
const GRID_COLS=4,GRID_ROWS=4;
const OX=(W-(GRID_COLS*CARD_W+(GRID_COLS-1)*GAP))/2;
const OY=(H-(GRID_ROWS*CARD_H+(GRID_ROWS-1)*GAP))/2+10;
let cards,flipped,locked,moves,won;
function shuffle(arr){
  for(let i=arr.length-1;i>0;i--){const j=Math.floor(Math.random()*(i+1));[arr[i],arr[j]]=[arr[j],arr[i]];}
  return arr;
}
function init(){
  const pool=shuffle([...EMOJIS,...EMOJIS]);
  cards=pool.map((emoji,i)=>{
    const col=i%GRID_COLS,row=Math.floor(i/GRID_COLS);
    return{emoji,faceUp:false,matched:false,x:OX+col*(CARD_W+GAP),y:OY+row*(CARD_H+GAP),flipT:0,flipping:false};
  });
  flipped=[];locked=false;moves=0;won=false;
}
function drawCard(card){
  const x=card.x,y=card.y;
  if(card.matched){
    ctx.fillStyle='#1a4a2a';
    ctx.strokeStyle='#44cc66';ctx.lineWidth=2;
    ctx.beginPath();ctx.roundRect?ctx.roundRect(x,y,CARD_W,CARD_H,8):ctx.rect(x,y,CARD_W,CARD_H);
    ctx.fill();ctx.stroke();
    ctx.font='42px serif';ctx.textAlign='center';
    ctx.fillText(card.emoji,x+CARD_W/2,y+CARD_H/2+14);
  }else if(card.faceUp){
    ctx.fillStyle='#f5f5ff';
    ctx.strokeStyle='#aaaacc';ctx.lineWidth=2;
    ctx.beginPath();ctx.roundRect?ctx.roundRect(x,y,CARD_W,CARD_H,8):ctx.rect(x,y,CARD_W,CARD_H);
    ctx.fill();ctx.stroke();
    ctx.font='42px serif';ctx.textAlign='center';
    ctx.fillText(card.emoji,x+CARD_W/2,y+CARD_H/2+14);
  }else{
    ctx.fillStyle='#0d2a4a';
    ctx.strokeStyle='#1a4a7a';ctx.lineWidth=2;
    ctx.beginPath();ctx.roundRect?ctx.roundRect(x,y,CARD_W,CARD_H,8):ctx.rect(x,y,CARD_W,CARD_H);
    ctx.fill();ctx.stroke();
    ctx.fillStyle='#1a3a5a';
    for(let dy=12;dy<CARD_H-8;dy+=14)for(let dx=12;dx<CARD_W-8;dx+=14){
      ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(x+dx,y+dy,2,0,Math.PI*2);ctx.fill();
    }
  }
}
function cardAt(mx,my){
  return cards.find(c=>mx>=c.x&&mx<c.x+CARD_W&&my>=c.y&&my<c.y+CARD_H);
}
cv.addEventListener('click',e=>{
  const rect=cv.getBoundingClientRect();
  const mx=e.clientX-rect.left,my=e.clientY-rect.top;
  if(won){init();return;}
  if(locked)return;
  const card=cardAt(mx,my);
  if(!card||card.faceUp||card.matched)return;
  card.faceUp=true;
  flipped.push(card);
  if(flipped.length===2){
    moves++;
    locked=true;
    const[a,b]=flipped;
    if(a.emoji===b.emoji){
      a.matched=true;b.matched=true;
      flipped=[];locked=false;
      if(cards.every(c=>c.matched))won=true;
    }else{
      setTimeout(()=>{a.faceUp=false;b.faceUp=false;flipped=[];locked=false;},800);
    }
  }
});
function draw(){
  ctx.fillStyle='#0a1a2a';ctx.fillRect(0,0,W,H);
  ctx.fillStyle='#fff';ctx.font='bold 16px monospace';ctx.textAlign='center';
  ctx.fillText('Memory Match',W/2,24);
  ctx.fillStyle='#aad4ff';ctx.font='13px monospace';
  ctx.fillText('Moves: '+moves,W/2,44);
  ctx.fillStyle='#aaa';ctx.font='10px monospace';
  ctx.fillText('Click cards to flip and find matching pairs',W/2,H-8);
  cards.forEach(drawCard);
  if(won){
    ctx.fillStyle='rgba(0,0,0,0.78)';ctx.fillRect(0,0,W,H);
    ctx.font='bold 44px serif';ctx.textAlign='center';
    ctx.fillStyle='#ffd700';
    ctx.fillText('🎉 You Win!',W/2,165);
    ctx.fillStyle='#fff';ctx.font='22px monospace';
    ctx.fillText('Moves: '+moves,W/2,218);
    ctx.fillStyle='#aaa';ctx.font='15px monospace';
    ctx.fillText('Click to play again',W/2,265);
  }
}
function loop(){draw();requestAnimationFrame(loop);}
init();loop();
</script>
</body>
</html>
